module.name: bignumber
module.description: A single large highlighted statistic (KPI) with an optional label and caption, split into up to three body sections.
module.aiSpec:
Showcase ONE headline statistic or KPI in large type with supporting text — a conversion rate, revenue figure, satisfaction score, etc. Use it to make a single number the focal point of a slide. For several bars side by side use @barchart; for a titled block of prose use @card.
Body: split by `<!-- @ -->` into up to three sections: - section 1 (required) = the big number/value, e.g. "98%" or "$1.2M". - section 2 (optional) = a short label under it. - section 3 (optional) = a smaller caption/footnote.
Parameters: - color (color, default var(--accent-color)): the big number's color. - align (select: left | center | right, default center): text alignment of the whole block. - numbersize (CSS length, default 3.5em): font size of the big number, e.g. 3em or 72px. - trend (select: none | up | down, default none): prepend a green ▲ or red ▼ arrow before the number. - labelcolor (color, default empty = theme): color of the label line (section 2).
Usage: <!-- @bignumber color: #16a34a, trend: up, numbersize: 4em --> +24% <!-- @ --> Year-over-year growth <!-- @ --> Measured across 1,200 responses <!-- @end -->

param.name: align
param.label: Align
param.desc: Text alignment of the whole block.

param.name: numbersize
param.label: Number size
param.desc: CSS size of the big number, e.g. 3em or 72px.

param.name: labelcolor
param.label: Label color
param.desc: Color of the label line; blank = theme default.

snippet.label: Big Number
snippet.text: <!-- @bignumber color: var(--accent-color) --> 98% <!-- @ --> Customer satisfaction <!-- @ --> Measured across 1,200 responses <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Large statistic with label and caption

snippet.label: Big Number (trend)
snippet.description: KPI with a colored up/down trend arrow.
